postReview.title: Columbus Crew 0-1 Inter Miami: Cremaschi header proves the difference
postReview.description: Lionel Messi played the full game for Inter Miami, but it was Benjamín Cremaschi who made the difference against the Columbus Crew.

preReview.title: Nancy not reinventing Columbus Crew's style to counter Miami
preReview.description: Columbus Crew and Inter Miami have both made unbeaten starts to MLS in 2025, and go head-to-head at Huntington Bank Field on Saturday.
